title: [HWASan][Fuchsia] Have Fuchsia use a dynamic shadow start
author: PiJoules
description: The dynamic shadow global is still set to zero, but this will change in the future. This only contains the llvm-side changes which is all that's needed for now.

tests.test_body:
target datalayout = "e-m:e-i8:8:32-i16:16:32-i64:64-i128:128-n32:64-S128"
target triple = "aarch64--linux-android22"

declare void @use(ptr)

; Function Attrs: sanitize_hwaddress
define void @test_alloca() #0 {
entry:
  %x = alloca i32, align 4
  call void @use(ptr %x)
  ret void
}

attributes #0 = { sanitize_hwaddress }
